name: @peppierre/typesafe-http
author: PePPierre <peppierre@gmail.com>
description: Type-safe HTTP client libraries for Angular using various runtime type checking libraries

scripts.pre-switchenv: rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf dist && rm package-lock.json
scripts.switchenv:ng16: npm run pre-switchenv && node scripts/prepare-version-specific-package.js --npmTag ng16 && npm run post-switchenv
scripts.switchenv:ng17: npm run pre-switchenv && node scripts/prepare-version-specific-package.js --npmTag ng17 && npm run post-switchenv
scripts.switchenv:ng18: npm run pre-switchenv && node scripts/prepare-version-specific-package.js --npmTag ng18 && npm run post-switchenv
scripts.switchenv:ng19: npm run pre-switchenv && node scripts/prepare-version-specific-package.js --npmTag ng19 && npm run post-switchenv
scripts.switchenv:ng20: npm run pre-switchenv && node scripts/prepare-version-specific-package.js --npmTag ng20 && npm run post-switchenv
